function.name: query_fabric_data_agent
function.description: Ask the deployed Fabric Data Agent about structured ticket and semantic-model questions. Use for open tickets, SLA status, backlog, priority, category, aging, counts, and follow-up analysis.

question.description: Natural-language question for the Fabric Data Agent. Be specific about what operational data you need (e.g., 'How many open high-priority tickets are there in the Network category?').

filters.description: Optional structured filters to narrow the query. Supported keys: priority (string, e.g. '1-Critical'), status (string, e.g. 'Open'), category (string), assignee_group (string), date_from (string ISO-8601), date_to (string ISO-8601).

max_rows.description: Maximum number of ticket rows to return. Use lower values for summaries, higher values for detailed lists.

function.name: search_knowledge
function.description: Retrieve KB articles, work notes, resolution notes, and cleaned HTML content from the Azure AI Search knowledge index. Use for documented fixes, known issues, internal notes, and procedural guidance.

query.description: Issue description, error message, or search query text. More detail yields better results.

ticket_id.description: Optional current ticket ID to scope context. When provided, the current ticket is excluded from results.

content_types.description: Filter results to specific content types. Omit to search all types.

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return.

function.name: search_incidents
function.description: Find similar historical incidents via vector search. Use when the user wants to know how a similar problem was resolved before, find prior incidents matching a symptom, or understand a historical resolution pattern.

query.description: Issue description, error message, or symptom text. The richer the description, the better the similarity matching.

ticket_id.description: Optional ID of the current open ticket. When provided, it is excluded from results to avoid self-matches.

top_k.description: Maximum number of similar incidents to return.

function.name: get_attachment_metadata
function.description: Retrieve metadata for attachments, documents, images, screenshots, log files, and scripts associated with a ServiceNow ticket. Use when the user asks about files, uploads, screenshots, logs, or documents attached to a ticket.

ticket_id.description: Primary ticket identifier (sys_id or number, e.g. INC0012345).

related_ticket_ids.description: Optional list of related ticket IDs to include in the asset search.

asset_types.description: Filter to specific asset categories. Omit to retrieve all types.

keywords.description: Optional keywords to filter assets by file name or summary (e.g., ['error', 'vpn', 'network']).

top_k.description: Maximum number of assets to return.
